summary_json.search_pattern_summary: Divides the search box into independent sectors for parallel coverage and easier monitoring.
summary_json.search_pattern_reason: Several drones can cover ground in parallel here, so dividing the area into sectors makes the mission easier to monitor while reducing redundant overlap. Katoomba, NSW spans about 4.8 by 6.7 km with mostly hill country. Staging sits about 2.4 km from the area centre. A last known point has been placed inside the area.
summary_json.search_pattern_fit_summary: Best when several drones can search in parallel without crowding each other. Current spacing is built around an effective swath of about 4.8 cells. Hill Country is the dominant ground type.
